content: I lived with my father from 2005 until his death in 2018. He always said he would divide the land equally between my sister and me. He never mentioned a will. In early 2017, he told me he was drafting a note with Dr. Arjun Mehta as trustee to ensure fairness. I found that handwritten note in his drawer after his death — it was on my own notebook, which I bought in January 2015. I never saw any signed will. When Priya filed the mutation in 2020, I was shocked. I checked the revenue records — the 2016 entry showing me as non-heir was clearly altered. The notary’s seal is fake; the firm closed in 2016. Mrs. Ghosh couldn’t have witnessed the signing — she was in the hospital. The ₹5 lakh withdrawal was not for legal fees — it went to a shell company Priya created. I have bank statements. The boundary stones were moved in January 2023 — I have photos. Mr. Ramesh Das, the officer who reviewed the mutation, was found dead with a note in his pocket that said, 'They know I know.' I believe he was poisoned. Priya is in debt. She was embezzling from my father’s savings. She hired Nandini Sen to type the will — but Nandini was on leave that week. I have her employer’s records. Priya is a criminal.
